heading: Exemption of educational assistance payments from taxation
label: 7636 Exemption of educational assistance payments from taxation
text: Notwithstanding any other law, any payment to, or on behalf of a participant in the Educational Assistance Program, for tuition, education expenses, a stipend, or education debt reduction under this chapter shall be exempt from taxation.
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “a stipend, or education debt reduction” for “or a stipend”.Pub. L. 105–3681991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4336 of this title
amendments: Amendments1998— substituted “a stipend, or education debt reduction” for “or a stipend”.Pub. L. 105–3681991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4336 of this title
